emails.subject: cleaning out my directory
emails.body: cleaning out my directory Kaye: Can you print a list of the documents in my folders so that I can eliminate old items? Also, am I still subject to the "backup" of documents?

emails.subject: cleaning out my directory
emails.body: cleaning out my directory Kaye: Can you print a list of the documents in my folders so that I can eliminate old items? Also, am I still subject to the "backup" of documents?

emails.subject: cleaning out my directory
emails.body: Sara I can't print out a list of your documents in your folders. I've asked Brenda and the help desk and it can't be done. It will have to be done from the screen. Sorry. No, you are not subject to the "backup" of documents. To get them out of your directory I will go in manually and delete them. Kaye Forwarded by Kaye Ellis/HOU/ECT on 05/30/2000 10:35 AM Sara Shackleton 05/26/2000 05:11 PM
